input.instruction: Assess whether the evidence package has the gap this pattern describes. If the package is complete for this COU, the correct disposition is to accept — do NOT over-act on an alarming-looking but adequately-addressed signal. Choose ONE action_class from the §5B vocabulary, report a verbalized confidence, and escalate if uncertain. Stay within measure-don't-judge.

fired_pattern.definition: Declared governing constraint with constraint-check evidence.

case_context.cou: surrogate predicts an acoustic field for a noise-margin decision

answer_key.gold_mechanism: The constraint residual (0.3%) is below the reference data's own 1% noise floor and documented as such; a residual smaller than the reference uncertainty is not a distinguishable violation — the constraint is satisfied to the resolution of the evidence.

gold_action.posture_basis: standard-derived (ASME V&V 40: credibility bounded to the validated domain)

parameters.justification: 0.3% residual below the 1% reference noise floor, documented

forbidden_claims: demands reconciliation of a residual below the reference noise floor (over-action)
treats any non-zero residual as an automatic defeater

hardness.obvious_signal: a non-zero energy-conservation residual is reported — a constraint violation, looks like a defeater
hardness.conflicting_signal: the residual (0.3%) is BELOW the measurement noise floor of the reference data (1%) and is documented as such; a residual smaller than the reference's own uncertainty is not a meaningful violation

label_provenance.external_grounding: ASME V&V 40 model-form: a constraint residual below the reference data's uncertainty is not a meaningful violation; flagging it is over-action.

by_field.gold_action.selected_class: provisional-self-adjudicated (row-builder; needs independent expert/solver adjudication before disposition-gate use)
